Perfect! I've successfully read all the requested files. Let me create a comprehensive summary of the complete contents:

## Complete File Contents Summary

### CSS/Design Token Files

**1. `/app.css`** (256 lines)
Contains comprehensive design tokens for light and dark modes:
- Status colors (open, in-progress, closed, blocked, failed, running, completed)
- Priority colors (P0-P4)
- Cost tier colors (cheap, standard, fast, smart)
- Document prose styling (links, code, pre, quote, table, muted text)
- Utility classes for badges and text colors

**2. `/routes/layout.css`** (3 lines)
Minimal file - just imports Tailwind CSS and defines a dark custom variant.

### SvelteKit Route Pages

**3. `/routes/documents/+page.svelte`** (59 lines)
Documents list page showing:
- Table with Title and Path columns
- Clickable rows to navigate to document detail
- Document count display
- Handles empty state

**4. `/routes/documents/[...path]/+page.svelte`** (527 lines)
Document detail and editor page with:
- Markdown rendering with DOMPurify sanitization
- WYSIWYG editor with syntax highlighting
- Plain markdown editor mode toggle
- Document link resolution and navigation within docs
- Frontmatter handling
- Save functionality via GraphQL mutation
- Full styling for doc content (headings, code blocks, tables, etc.)

**5. `/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/documents/+page.svelte`** (59 lines)
Project-scoped documents list (same structure as root documents page).

**6. `/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/documents/[...path]/+page.svelte`** (527 lines)
Project-scoped document editor (same as root documents detail page).

**7. `/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/plugins/+page.svelte`** (536 lines)
Plugins list page showing:
- Grid layout of plugin cards (responsive md:2 col, xl:3 col)
- Plugin status badges (available, installed, update-available)
- Install/update/uninstall buttons with worker status
- Keywords display
- Disk usage formatting
- Plugin manifest display
- Install dialog with scope selection
- Real-time worker progress subscription

**8. `/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/plugins/[name]/+page.svelte`** (282 lines)
Plugin detail page with:
- Manifest display in YAML format
- Versions section (registry, installed, type, disk)
- Skills, Prompts, Templates lists
- Update and Uninstall buttons
- Worker status link
- Confirm dialog for uninstall action

**9. `/nodes/[nodeId]/providers/+page.svelte`** (459 lines)
Agent endpoints overview page with:
- Table of providers and harnesses (unified)
- Provider health status indicators
- Token usage tracking (1h / 24h)
- Utilization percentage with progress bar
- Sparkline trend visualization
- Default route widget showing model resolution
- Polling for live updates (2.5s intervals)
- Kind filtering (ENDPOINT vs HARNESS)

**10. `/nodes/[nodeId]/providers/[name]/+page.svelte`** (204 lines)
Provider detail/trend page with:
- 7-day hourly token series chart
- 30-day 4-hour bucket series chart
- Quota ceiling overlay visualization
- Token usage formatting
- Projected run-out hours calculation
- Trend data fetching on mount

**11. `/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/executions/+page.svelte`** (266 lines)
Executions list page with:
- Filter form (bead, verdict, harness, search)
- Execution table with Created, Bead, Harness, Verdict, Duration, Cost columns
- Verdict badge coloring based on status
- Pagination (Previous/Next)
- Uses design system utilities (text-headline-md, text-body-sm, etc.)
- Cost and duration formatting functions

**12. `/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/commits/+page.svelte`** (165 lines)
Commits list page with:
- Table with SHA, Subject, Author, Date, Beads, Execution columns
- Execution lookup via GraphQL for each commit
- Bead reference buttons
- Pagination support
- Uses design system utilities matching executions page
- Date formatting

## Key Observations

**Design System Integration:**
- Files 11-12 (executions and commits) use semantic typography classes (text-headline-md, text-body-sm, text-label-caps, etc.)
- Files 3-10 use Tailwind CSS with gray scale colors and dark mode support
- app.css provides custom CSS variables for status/priority/tier colors and doc prose styling

**Architectural Pattern:**
- Duplicated routes at root and under `/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/` (documents, plugins)
- Each detail page has navigation back to list
- GraphQL mutation/subscription pattern for plugin dispatch and updates
- Real-time polling for status updates

**File Paths:**
- `/app.css`
- `/routes/layout.css`
- `/routes/documents/+page.svelte`
- `/routes/documents/[...path]/+page.svelte`

git add \
  cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\[nodeId\]/projects/\[projectId\]/documents/+page.svelte \
  "cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/documents/[...path]/+page.svelte" \
  cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\[nodeId\]/projects/\[projectId\]/plugins/+page.svelte \
  "cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/plugins/[name]/+page.svelte" \
  cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\[nodeId\]/providers/+page.svelte \
  "cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/providers/[name]/+page.svelte" && \
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(ui): restyle documents, plugins, and providers views with design tokens [ddx-b2ce2335]

Apply design token classes (fg-ink, fg-muted, bg-surface, border-line,
accent-lever, label-caps, mono-code, badge-status-*) to all six views,
replacing gray-scale Tailwind utilities. Sharp containers (no rounded-lg),
label-caps table headers, status badge utilities, and doc CSS vars for
prose rendering are now consistent with executions and commits views.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

data.text: All 6 files restyled and committed cleanly. The changes replace gray-scale Tailwind utilities with design tokens across documents, plugins, and providers views — sharp containers, label-caps table headers, `badge-status-*` utilities for plugin status, `doc CSS vars` for prose rendering, and consistent `fg-ink`/`fg-muted`/`border-line`/`accent-lever` tokens throughout.
